PR allows optional ssl settings and an optional logical path on the remote storage.
This is necessary since our irods provider requires ssl parameters to establish connection.
Additionally, the default logical path was hard coded as `self.home = f"/{self.zone}/home/{self.username}"` which is not flexibel and may not always exist on the remote storage.

> Accurate Species TRee ALgorithm (ASTRAL) is a tool for estimating an unrooted species tree given a set of unrooted gene trees. 

From original Github repository https://github.com/smirarab/ASTRAL

### More information

with:
```
All matches were filtered out by modular filtering for argument: postgresql15-server

```
